generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current (I_M) into rotational torque (τ_M) via gear transmission for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance PrimaryGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActuatorComponent [
    base:desc "Primary gearbox transforming motor torque (τ_G) into intermediate output torque with low gear ratio for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActuatorComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing final output torque (τ_out) with precise positional accuracy for machining applications, mounted after primary gearbox"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor to measure rotational position and velocity (ω) of the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox to measure output angle and velocity of the gearwheel, enabling friction and elasticity analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor for friction analysis and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) describing the motor-gearbox system structure with rotational (torque/velocity) and electrical (current) flows for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) connecting motor, primary gearbox, and cycloidal gearbox components with their interconnections for the first axis"
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Coulomb-Viscous friction effects in the motor-gearbox system for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Stribeck friction behavior (viscosity-dependent) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Dahl friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink LuGre friction model simulating kinetic and viscous friction effects for the first axis"
]

instance RobotDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model computing derived parameters (torque, angular velocity) from sensor inputs using robot-specific parameters (gear ratios, motor constants) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual input current (I_M) measured from the permanent magnet synchronous motor during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotDynamicsModel
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual motor torque (τ_M) measured from the motor encoder during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotDynamicsModel
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual angular velocity (ω) measured from the motor encoder during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotDynamicsModel
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual output angle measured from the gearbox encoder during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotDynamicsModel
]

instance SimulatedIdealTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ideal system behavior torque simulation (without friction) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedFrictionTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Friction-affected torque simulation (with Coulomb-Viscous/Stribeck/Dahl/LuGre models) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotDynamicsModel
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueVariationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque variation (δτ_M) calculated from measured vs simulated data for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorTorqueData, SimulatedIdealTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorqueVariationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox torque variation (δτ_G) derived from encoder position differences for elasticity analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData, MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotDynamicsModel
]

instance DerivedOutputAngleVariationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle variation (δθ_out) calculated from encoder readings for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData, MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LuGreFrictionModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool (BDD/IBD) for structural and behavioral modeling of the motor-gearbox system for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, MotionAccuracyService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for executable simulation of friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and system dynamics for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from the robot's CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for structured data exchange and integration of digital shadows with other systems for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing components that consume data traces and produce output (e.g., friction-adjusted torque/velocity) via simulation models for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterUpdateService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction identification combining white-box (analytical friction models) and black-box (data-driven models) to dynamically adjust friction parameters during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance MultiPhysicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi-physics-aware analysis using MATLAB Simulink models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) to simulate friction effects and compare with live measurements"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization aggregating data traces (motor current, torque, angular velocity) into a unified interface for friction loss detection and motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightAggregationAction
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for static, kinetic, and viscous friction detection using white-box/black-box models for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDetectionInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that adjusts control algorithms by comparing measured vs simulated data to reduce positional errors (0.1 mm repeatability)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionalImprovementAction
]

instance ParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service dynamically updating friction parameters during operation to adapt to wear or load variations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterAdaptationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box/black-box models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis showing improvement in motion accuracy by comparing measured vs simulated data to reduce positional errors (0.1 mm repeatability)"
]

instance FrictionDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction-related inaccuracies in the motor-gearbox system that contribute to up to 30% positioning errors in the first axis"
]

instance PositionalImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control algorithms to reduce positional errors by comparing measured vs simulated data for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterAdaptationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic updating of friction parameters during operation to adapt to wear or load variations in the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InsightAggregationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Aggregation of friction loss detection and motion accuracy improvement insights into a unified dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of friction parameters based on live operational data for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnvironmentComponent : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, PrimaryGearbox, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor,
        MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData, MotorCurrentData,
        MotorTorqueData, AngularVelocityData, OutputAngleData,
        SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel,
        CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel,
        DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel,
        RobotDynamicsModel,
        MeasuredMotorCurrentData, MeasuredMotorTorqueData,
        MeasuredAngularVelocityData, MeasuredOutputAngleData,
        SimulatedIdealTorqueData, SimulatedFrictionTorqueData,
        DerivedMotorTorqueVariationData, DerivedGearboxTorqueVariationData,
        DerivedOutputAngleVariationData,
        MQTTProtocol, MATLABSimulink, SysMLModelingTool,
        AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent,
        RealTimeFrictionService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService,
        DashboardVisualizationService, FrictionAnalysisService,
        MotionAccuracyService, ParameterUpdateService,
        FrictionLossDetectionInsight, MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight,
        FrictionDetectionInsight, PositionalImprovementAction,
        ParameterAdaptationAction, InsightAggregationAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and near-real-time**:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, encoders) is streamed at **high rates** (implied by live operational data requirements).
  - **Model update frequency**: Friction models are **continuously refined** during operation to account for wear, load changes, or tool variations, enabling **dynamic adaptation** to operational conditions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **A single Digital Shadow** focused on the **first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot**, incorporating:
    - **Asset (Mabi)**: The physical robot axis with motor, gearbox, and encoders.
    - **Purpose (FrictionDerivation)**: Understanding friction loss to improve motion accuracy.
    - **Data Traces**: Measured and simulated parameters (e.g., torque, angular velocity) linked via **Processing components** (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB).
    - **Models**: SysML BDD/IBD for structure, and Simulink for friction simulations.
  - **No decentralized twins** are mentioned; the DT is centralized around the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Models the ideal mechanical structure and friction behavior of the first axis using **SysML and simulation tools**.
  - **As-manufactured**: Incorporates **live sensor data** and **dynamics models** to account for manufacturing tolerances and initial friction conditions.
  - **As-operated**: Continuously updates friction models via **real-time data-driven learning** to adapt to wear, load variations, or tool changes during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: SysML models (BDD/IBD) and Simulink simulations are validated against **robot-specific parameters** (e.g., gear ratios, motor constants).
  - **Validation**: Real-time comparison of **measured vs. simulated data** (e.g., torque/velocity traces) to detect friction deviations.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Encoder-based redundancy (motor vs. gearbox encoders) reduces positional uncertainty by detecting elasticity/friction.
  - **Uncertainty Quantification**: Friction models (white-box/black-box) are refined iteratively to minimize discrepancies between predicted and actual behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time sensor data streaming from the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Enables structured data exchange and integration with other systems (e.g., manufacturing processes).
  - **SysML Models**: Defined in **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** tools (e.g., SysML IDE) for structural and behavioral modeling."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **Manufacturing Systems**: Enables **real-time feedback** from the robot to machining processes (e.g., milling) via AAS for optimized toolpath generation.
  - **Other Digital Twins**: Not explicitly mentioned; the focus is on the first axis’s Digital Shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML (Systems Modeling Language)**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Standardized framework for digital product data exchange in Industry 4.0.
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time sensor data communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT includes safety considerations:
  - **Safety Cell**: Restricts the robot’s working range to [-90°, 90°] to prevent collisions.
  - **Real-Time Data Validation**: Ensures only accurate sensor data is processed to avoid erroneous control decisions.
  - **No Remote Execution**: The Digital Shadow is **passive** (one-way data flow), with active processing components (e.g., Simulation) running on a separate system (e.g., MATLAB Simulink)."
]
